task: Find a pair of wireless headphones on Amazon with active noise canceling for $100 or less and add them to the cart.
graderReasoning: The agent found a qualifying product and added it to the Amazon cart. Evidence on the product page shows it is wireless and has active noise canceling: the title reads “Soundcore by Anker Q20i Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling Headphones, Wireless Over-Ear Bluetooth...” and the details list “Connectivity Technology Wireless” plus “Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling.” The price was verified via locator text as “$39.99,” which is within the $100 limit. After clicking Add to Cart and dismissing the protection-plan upsell, the resulting Amazon Shopping Cart/add-to-cart page shows “1 item in cart,” “Added to cart,” and a cart dialog/subtotal of “$39.99” with the Soundcore Q20i listed. Therefore the task was completed.
final_result_response: Done. I added the Soundcore by Anker Q20i Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling Wireless Over-Ear Headphones to your Amazon cart for $39.99.
action_history: Opening Amazon: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.amazon.com/');
Opening a candidate headphone product: await page.locator('e80').click();
Adding the headphones to the cart: await page.locator('#add-to-cart-button').click();
Skipping protection plan and confirming cart: await page.locator('e751').click();
